title: Junior .NET Scenario 1
prompt: Design a POST endpoint for creating a resource with request validation, DTO mapping, and correct HTTP status codes.
constraints: Validate required fields and formats before persistence
Return 400 for validation errors with field-level messages
Return 201 with resource location on success
Keep domain model and response DTO separated

examples.output: 201 Created with response DTO and Location header.
400 with validation errors

expectedApproach: State the data structure/algorithm choice, justify tradeoffs, then implement cleanly.
idealSolutionOutline: Describe optimal strategy, implement, validate with edge cases, and summarize complexity.
evaluationNotes: Reward correct logic, clear tradeoffs, and interview communication.
